The '''Silly Rabbit''' was a [[Constellation/Legends|constellation]] visible from the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]]. One of its stars was the [[Coachelle system/Legends|Coachelle system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

Citizens of the Centrality named it for the rabbitlike [[Lepi/Legends|Lepi]] who called Coachelle their home. The [[Flamewind of Oseon/Legends|Flamewind]] of [[Oseon sun|Oseon]] often twisted a braid of colorful radiation through the constellation as seen from the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroids]] of the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]].

==Behind the scenes==
The constellation was originally part of a joke created by ''[[Star Wars: The Lando Calrissian Adventures|The Adventures of Lando Calrissian]]'' author [[L. Neil Smith]]. In ''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]'', Smith writes, "Outside, a braid of raspberry red, lemon yellow, and orange orange twisted through the heavens, across a constellation the locals called the Silly Rabbit." This paragraph refers to advertising for [[Wikipedia:Trix (cereal)|Trix breakfast cereal]], whose rabbit mascot would seek out the fruit-flavored food featuring those colors before being told, "Silly rabbit, Trix are for kids."
